warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Learning Objective
criteria.description: Shows comprehension of the subject matter and establishes a goal for the specific audience.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant exhibits no grasp of the event's subject, or an incorrect subject is addressed, and no learning goal is established.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The subject matter is not clearly understood, regardless of whether a learning goal is present.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solid grasp of the subject is evident, along with a defined learning goal.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: An advanced comprehension of the subject is demonstrated, accompanied by a specific learning goal tailored for the target audience.

criteria.name: Research
criteria.description: Present the primary discoveries derived from the investigation into the subject.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No details are provided regarding the research conducted or its outcomes.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The results from the subject research are presented in an ambiguous manner.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The outcomes of the subject research are articulated with clarity.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The discoveries from the subject research are explained clearly and are substantiated with supporting evidence.

criteria.name: Script
criteria.description: Detail the stages involved in developing the design and authoring the script.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No information is given about how the design was developed or how the script was written.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The process of design development and script creation is explained in an unclear way.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The stages of design development and script creation are articulated clearly.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A clear explanation of the design development and script writing process is provided, supported by evidence.

criteria.name: Techniques
criteria.description: Articulate the specific video and audio methods employed in the production of the Public Service Announcement.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: There is no discussion of how audio or video elements were utilized or put into practice.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two methods were applied in the creation of the PSA.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three to four methods were applied and described in the creation of the PSA.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Five or more methods were applied in the creation of the PSA and explained using specialized vocabulary.

criteria.name: Equipment & Software
criteria.description: Describe at least three types of tools or programs utilized in creating the Public Service Announcement.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No explanation is provided regarding the equipment or software used.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One piece of equipment or software was used to produce the PSA.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Two pieces of equipment or software were used to produce the PSA.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three or more pieces of equipment or software were used to produce the PSA and described using specialized vocabulary.

criteria.name: Copyright/Sources
criteria.description: Information regarding copyright and sources is documented, and the video content is original.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Copyright and source details are either not addressed or are addressed incorrectly, AND the video content is not original.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The material infringes upon copyright rules; sources are not mentioned OR the video content is not original.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Copyright and source information is properly recorded, and the video content is original.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Compliance with copyright and source information is visually documented, and the video content is original.

criteria.name: PSA Video Presentation
criteria.description: The Public Service Announcement is displayed during the presentation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The PSA is not shown during the presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The PSA is shown during the presentation.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated
criteria.description: The points made are structured logically and conveyed with clarity.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) appeared unprepared.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the delivery lacked a coherent order.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order, and the points were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.
criteria.description: Regularly exhibits self-assurance, composed body language, engaging eye contact, and effective vocal projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified abilities were demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified abilities (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or vocal projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified abilities (self-assurance, body language, eye contact, or vocal projection) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All abilities were demonstrated, improving the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to provide effective answers to questions.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: Does not respond to questions, or responses are completely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Provides incomplete or unclear answers, indicating limited comprehension.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds accurately and clearly to most questions, demonstrating sufficient understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Responds confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful answers that enhance the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The execution aligns with the guidelines (all conditions must be satisfied).

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: Only permitted technology devices were used (sizing specifications were followed; a maximum of two, with only one facing judges at a time); the presentation matched the assigned topic; the PSA was no longer than 60 seconds; professional boundaries were maintained during set-up time (no interaction with judges); no materials were left behind after the presentation; links or QR codes were displayed appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges); audio was presented without external speakers (preliminary round); the use of food or live animals was avoided.
